headline: Assessing Corpay (CPAY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Long Term Gains
summary: Corpay (CPAY) has drawn investor attention after its recent share performance, with the stock showing mixed returns over the past month and past 3 months, prompting closer scrutiny of its payments focused business model. See our latest analysis for Corpay. At a share price of $293.34, Corpay has recently seen a 1 month share price return decline of 12.28% and a year to date share price return decline of 2.41%.
